candidates.why: Separate operating expense line at the same level as the selected SG&A component rows ('Other external costs' and 'Staff costs'), so it appears outside those selected rows and would otherwise not be captured. However, it combines depreciation with impairment, which is outside scope for pure D&A.

final_choice.row_label: Total Amortization of Intangible Assets (excl Goodwill)

variables.notes: The statement shows separate operating lines for 'Depreciation and impairment' and 'Amortisation and impairment' outside the selected XSGA component rows, which suggests D&A is not embedded in the selected SG&A rows. But both visible numeric rows include impairment, and impairment must be ignored for this task. No clean numeric depreciation-only or amortisation-only operating row is provided, so manual review is needed to avoid adding impairment.
